entry.title: Re: Function Module/BAPI to Obsolete a DP in VIM SAP

hello,
can we have a report for the the ID deleted from se38 ?

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: Creating/enabling a new WFA on HANA instance
entry.content: Hi @Marina_Popa - you can start import the template configuration, no need to wait for measure template upload.  The measure template is needed when you want to view the measures on WFA site.

entry.title: Re: WFA - Permission artifacts sync job failing
entry.content:
Hi @amfonseca,

Can you please narrow down on which structural dimension the artifact sync failed?  If this happened on Location structure, usually this is caused by duplicate nodes in the structure.  That is nodes with different letter case but actually refer to the same thing.  You can use Dimension Editor menu to have a look at the Location structure.  If it was failed on other structural dimensions, please check for duplicate as well.

entry.title: Re: Contract Request document could not be sent to the external system. Error Message: Response retu
entry.content: I'm experiencing this same error. were you later able to find the fix?

entry.title: Request for Assistance Extending SAP Certificate Validity
entry.content:
Dear SAP Certification Team,

I hope this message finds you well.

My SAP certification (linked below) is set to expire on March 31, and I would like to extend its validity. However, the system prompts me to have an Active SAP Learning Subscription (SAP LH). As a freelancer with over 10 years of hands-on experience in this specific product, I would like to clarify:

Is the SAP Learning Subscription mandatory to renew this certification?

If so, are there alternative pathways for experienced professionals to extend certification validity without this subscription?

The current cost of the SAP LH subscription (₹1.12 lakh INR) for an individual contributor, especially as it exceeds the certification fee by nearly fourfold. Also, SAP LH does not appear to be available for individual purchase, creating a significant barrier for freelancers like myself.

I have recently completed two additional certifications (details available upon request) and remain committed to maintaining my credentials. Could you advise if there are:

Exemptions for professionals with extensive experience?

Alternative assessments or renewal options without SAP LH?

Any upcoming programs for individual/affordable renewal pathways?

Your guidance would help me retain my certification and continue contributing to the SAP ecosystem.

Certificate Details:
https://www.credly.com/badges/99100aa7-dc1f-4d08-8aff-55397bfb6c43/public_url

Thank you for your time and support.
Best regards,
Sankaran A

entry.title: Re: Flow Builder: Using exit to fetch HBKID/HKTID for Accounting Documents missed those information
entry.content:
@RenatoEXT973 

As stated in this post, OP2022 by default using Flow Builder Plus, hence the loading class concept is depreciated.

Refer to my posts regards Flow Builder Plus for a better understanding.

entry.title: Re: "I am not able to take the 'Stay Certified' assessment.
entry.content: I am reporting the same issue when performing Take Assessment for C_THR81, C_HRHPC and C_THR94. If anyone knows the answer, please help share. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Can we still edit a Transferred Sales Order from C4C...
entry.content: Hi Robert - it's mostly on Open/In Process tickets only. Orders that aren't processed yet before the cut-off times. We are currently using S4 HANA on premise and we are using standard integration.

entry.title: SolMan Java -> Diagnostics Agentの通信で使用するポートについて
entry.content:
担当者様
平素よりお世話になっております。

SolMan Java -> Diagnostics Agentの通信ですが、Diagnostics Agentが待ち受けているポート番号をご教授頂けないでしょうか。

また、この通信で SolMan Java がどの Diagnostics Agent に接続するかの情報はどこに保存されているのかをご教授頂けないでしょうか。

以上、よろしくお願い致します。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SolMan Java -> Diagnostics Agentの通信で使用するポートについて
entry.content:
ご担当者　様

平素よりお世話になっております。

Diagnostics Agent が Solution Manager Java へ接続する際には、Solution Manager Java ホスト上のポート81xxおよび5xx04（P4Sポート有効時は5xx06）をご利用いただいております。

詳細につきましては、以下のナレッジベース技術記事をご参照ください。
2012760 - Ports in Solution Manager for Diagnostics Agent registration

エージェント接続情報は、下記ファイルに格納されております。
・パス：/usr/sap/DAA/<SMDAXX>/SMDAgent/configuration/
・対象ファイル：runtime.properties および secstore.properties

宜しくお願いいたします。

SAPサポート

Dear customer,

Regarding invoice for consignment, please follow the best practice below:

Customer Consignment (1IU)

Best regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: SUM Upgrade Fails: Missing DDNTT Table & EA-DFPS Not Imported – Need Guidance
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I'm facing critical issues during a SUM upgrade of S/4HANA system (SID: S4D, DB: HANA 2.00.078) with SUM 2.0 SP22. The upgrade fails during the Extract phase with the error:

"EA-DFPS is in an undefined state that is not safe to be upgraded. Reason: Upgrade wasn't completed - Contact the SAP Support!"

Environment Details:

  • System: SAP S/4HANA (SID: S4D)
  • Database: SAP HANA (Version: 2.00.078.00.1715149848, DB SID: DDH)
  • Current Version: SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS 01 (02/2024)
  • Target Version: SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS 02 (10/2024)
  • SUM Version: Initially SUM 2.0 SP19 (PL10); later upgraded to SUM 2.0 SP22
  • OS: Linux X86_64 (OS Version: 2.34)

Problem Overview and Timeline:

  1. During the upgrade process with SUM 2.0 SP19, SUM attempted to access table DDNTT during the step Preprocessing, phase EU_CLONE_ALLSIZES.
  2. I confirmed by querying M_TABLES that the table DDNTT does not exist in the system.
  3. I then Reset and Cleanup the SUM process and I switched to SUM 2.0 SP22 in the hope that the newer version would handle the missing DDNTT differently.
  4. However, SUM now fails during the Extract step, at PREP_INIT/VALCHK_INI phase,  with the error message:
    "EA-DFPS is in an undefined state that is not safe to be upgraded. Reason: Upgrade wasn't completed - Contact the SAP Support!"
  5. Using transaction SPAM, I checked the package status and confirmed that all EA-DFPS packages are marked as "Not Imported".

Files Attached:

  • SAPup_troubleticket.txt (complete error summary)
  • SAPup.txt (SUM log)
  • Screenshot-SUM.jpg (screenshot of SUM error)

Has anyone encountered a similar situation where SUM fails due to a missing DDNTT table and EA-DFPS packages not being imported?

Any insights, SAP Notes references, or step-by-step guidance would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your help!

Best regards,
Ben

Feel free to let me know if any additional details are needed.

entry.title: 回复： Re: How to achieve Cost of Poor Quality / Third Party...
entry.content:
Hi Pardeep,

I think source inspection can cover the third-party inspection you mentioned.

And regarding to the cost tracking in QM, there is no workaround in public cloud. A feature reqeust needs to be raised.

Best Regards,
Matt

entry.title: Re: Authorisations for Fiori App
entry.content:
Hello Abhishek,

Thanks for the response 

After I copy the SAP role to Z business role i run the task list.I add the catalog and the space related to the role. The apps are added to the spaces as well.

I check if all the services in role are green and ICF nodes are active.

But still get the errors related to Service groups metadata, ESH_Search_srv.

Do we solve these authorisation errors one by one; I expected it to be fixed by the run of task list.

Is there any step that i am missing that even after activation the authorisation issues are not solved.

entry.title: Re: SAP B1: Open a form as View Mode
entry.content: Unfortunately, I'm using SAP B1 10.0 on premise not on cloud.

entry.title: Re: Welcome, glad to see you here!
entry.content: nice to see everybody here virtually.

entry.title: Need help with CL_GUI_DOCKING_CONTAINER, SIZE BAR.
entry.content:
I often use DOCKING CONTAIENR to do ALV GIRD.

If you use the DOCKING CONTAINER, it will be attached to one of TOP, BOTTOM, LEFT, and RIGHT.

At this point, the SIZE BAR will appear on the other side where the CONTAINER can be adjusted.

I want to use DOCKING CONTAINER to keep the SIZE BAR from coming out.

I know how to prevent SIZE BAR from coming out using CL_GUI_SPLITTER_CONTAINER, but I couldn't find a way to prevent SIZE BAR from coming out using DOCKING CONTAINER.

I'd like to hear from you if there is a method for the above or if it's impossible.

I ask for your help.

entry.title: Re: 导入销售合同—2302云销售新功能前瞻
entry.content: @omega-ou 据我了解只支持内部编码，如果你用外部编码的话，还需要通过VA02去更改，你可以试试

entry.title: Re: Re: Fiori App Analyze PIR Quality
entry.content: The Analyze PIR Quality app has been deprecated. The functions are available in the ”Maintain PIRs” app. You can refer to the link below to get more information. https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/e296651f454c4284ade361292c633d69/3d465d4e8e40411e962f0ed4ab94e8d2.html?version=2022.000

entry.title: Re: SG GST Report - Not able to download data from preview
entry.content:
For SG GST return, the download function is not support. You can print it.

For SG GST return submission, the download function is support.

Request failed with status code 500". Could you please check? thank you

Chantal

entry.title: Re: Work Schedule rule and IT0007/IT0008
entry.content:
System will take care the number of working Hours. While configuring IT007 it will take default value. But when you execute payroll and check PARTT Function under GENPS the Days calculation will vary from month to month. 

You can do a check on Over time wage type for the month of Jan and Feb based on working hours in this case I believe we should alter Valuation basis PCR

entry.title: SAP Desktop Agent can't Add Attributes or run Unattended Mode projects
entry.content:
I'm currently trying to run a SAP Business Process, which executes a Task Automation process. The process is relatively straightforward, the Task Automation reads from a CSV, and outputs the variables into a form back in the Business Process. I followed the steps in the Agent Management agent settings tutorial:

- SAP Desktop Agent is installed and connected to tenant. It can run automations in Design Mode.

- The agent is added to the environment under Agent Management. It is shown as idle.

- The project has been deployed, and the agent version set to match the Desktop Agent.

The only thing I was unable to follow was the adding of agent attributes, as the trial version doesn't let me create a new environment or add any agent attributes to the existing environment. When I run the process, the project does not load into the agent, even though it is connected and idle in the environment. In addition, checking the agent's available projects shows nothing. May I know any steps I am missing?

Any help would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: 回复： 导入销售合同—2302云销售新功能前瞻

@Feng_Chen ，我刚才测试了，导入销售订单了，VA02修改不了销售订单号的。

entry.title: How to Print Comments in the TAB Console in Eclipse for Custom Logic in SAP Public Cloud?
entry.content:
I'm developing custom logic in SAP Public Cloud using Eclipse for debug, and I need to print out comments or debug messages inside the TAB Console. I've tried a few approaches, such as using write:, but I haven't been able to get the output to appear as expected.

Has anyone successfully achieved this? Are there specific commands or configurations required to enable logging in the Eclipse console for SAP Public Cloud custom logic?

 

Regards,

entry.title: Re: ABAP RICEF Estimating Guidelines
entry.content:
Hi , 

if i understand your requirement correctly , you are looking for WRICEF estimate calculator which takes into account the high , low and medium nature of the complexity during the initial project planning   and also helps you to come with a initial effort number based on this scientific approach rather than by gut feel.

entry.title: Need help with X015 and X115 PCRs
entry.content:
Please find attached the image and kindly advise what exactly the below operators do in X115 - Valuation bases.

Pls advise why we have included ADDNA* and FILLF N repeatedly. What is the relevance of these operators? 

Does VALBS0 update IT and OT tables?

VALBS0

ADDNA *

FILLF N

WGTYP = *

VALBS1

ADDNA *

FILLF N

WGTYP = *

VALBS2

ADDNA *

Pls find attached the image.

@sikindar_a

entry.title: Re: Need help with X015 and X115 PCRs
entry.content: NIL

entry.title: Re: "I am not able to take the 'Stay Certified' assessment.
entry.content: I came across the same issue and raised a ticket, but no response yet.

entry.title: Re: SAP SOM with SD Billing
entry.content:
Hi,

The Add-on product SAP S/4HANA for Subscription Billing, Sales and Distribution Option 1.0 (SOLINVE 800) handles such business processes where the subscription contract lifecycle management is taken care in BRIM-SOM but the billing and invoicing is done in SD. This is typically for subscription processes with FI-AR scenarios. Below is the link of the landing page for the add-on. You can have a look at the product assistance and installation guides for details.

SAP S/4HANA for Subscription Billing, Sales and Distribution Option | SAP Help Portal

NOTE: You will still need a dummy contract account and a lean convergent invoicing. The CI billing document is transferred to SD invoicing using the add-on processes. Thanks.

Regards
Deepak

entry.title: Re: Transfer Stock Using Manual Reservation
entry.content: Hi Dominik, If we just do transfer posting, yes I've managed to do it. But how we do it through manual reservation?

entry.title: Re: "I am not able to take the 'Stay Certified' assessment.
entry.content:
Hi, Try to open these links during midnight during work week. Not on weekends, this is just because of network traffic and not a majar issue...

The whole world their SAP certification are expiring on 31st March..just imagine the network traffic on these sites.

entry.title: Re: Request for information about BAdI in the Calculation Schema

entry.title: Controlling Issue Stor Location of Constituents in MRP Area
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts

Good afternoon.

We have two MRP areas set up for our plant and several storage areas under each. We are also using PP/DS.

The problem we are having is that we cannot control the Issue Stor Location for Component A when we run the MRP for Product A. We want to set the Issue Stor Location of component A to storage location X or storage location Y or whatever we want.

Currently, even if I specify the Issue Stor Location of the manufacturing version of Product A as Storage Location X in MRP Area ①, the Issue Stor Locations of Components A, B, and C are not set to X. (X is an assumption that the Issue Stor Location is not set to the Leading storage location in the MRP Area ① setting in the PP/DS Location Master.)

Please help.

Pardeep

entry.title: Re: Call for Speakers (SIT DFW) - spring 2025
entry.content:
Hi @SergioG_TX 

Thank you for the opportunity! 😊

I wanted to follow up to see if you had a chance to review my previous message.

Topic: AI & ML-Driven Intelligent Condition Monitoring for Seamless Rail Operations

Techwave has developed an Intelligent Condition Monitoring Platform integrated with SAP ERP using Microsoft Azure to enhance performance, minimize unplanned downtime, and improve reliability for a leading Australian transport and energy business. 

Spokesperson: Srinivas Kode


Could you please let me know where we can send the abstract? Also, kindly let me know if you need any additional details.


I look forward to your response.


Thank you!

Best,
Sravya Palukuru
Email: sravya.palukuru@techwave.net

entry.title: Re: Reference document number in Intercompany Matching Re...
entry.content: Hello, Please check the SAP note: 3114245 - Using Document Reference field (XBLNR) in ICMR

entry.title: Re: Aggregation on Data Action

entry.title: Re: Electronic Invoicing in Malaysia
entry.content:
Hello Mervyn,

We are in ECC6 EHP6. For Malaysia e-Invoicing the per-requisite support pack 12 is not yet reached. But, despite that, want to implement Malaysia e-Invoicing solution. Will that still be possible without upgrading to support pack 12 or above?

What key features I have to consider if I have to go ahead with existing support pack level below recommended one.

Your quick response is highly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Integrating with the Alerts System API in SAP Service Cloud V2
entry.content:
Hey @pvsbprasad ,

I have 2 questions:

  1. Is this feature only available for "Individual Customers" UI and not for other UIs like Accounts or Opportunities or leads etc?(Content type is always set to INDIVIDUAL_CUSTOMER) And if yes, then do you know if there are plans to make it available in the future by SAP?
  2. What are the other allowed value of response's icon? "error_filled" was just an example, but how can one pass some warning or informational messages?

You wrote "To send an alert to the system, use the following JSON request format" but that's not true because (based on what I read on Help documentation, pls feel free to correct me) system sends these attributes to Alert API endpoint when UI loads and consuming system just need to consume the request body and send out the response payload back.

Thanks

Saurabh

entry.title: Vendor Rebate Arrangement Error
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

When I try to create a Vendor Rebate Arrangement in MEB1, I get an error like this:

"Transaction MEB1 cannot be executed (SAP Note 2476734)

Message No. 00977

Diagnosis

The execution of the transaction was disabled by a system configuration (the blacklist monitor).

Procedure

Avoid using this transaction or contact your system administrator.

Procedure for System Administration

For more information about the blacklist monitor, see SAP Note 2476734.

Please support.

Thanks in Advance,

entry.title: 🧹 Spring Cleaning Your SAP Customer Data! (FI-AR, SD Archiving Explained Simply)
entry.content:
What is Customer Master Data Archiving? 📦

Imagine you have tons of customer files, some for active customers, and many for those you haven't dealt with in ages. Archiving is like moving those inactive customer files from your "active filing cabinet" (your live SAP database) to a well-organized "archive box" (an archive file).

Why Archive Customer Master Data? 🤔

Boost Performance: Less data in your live system means faster processing and reports! 🚀
Save Storage Space: Archived data takes up less space in your main database. 💾
Compliance: Meet legal and company requirements for data retention and deletion. ✅
Keep it Clean: A cleaner system is easier to manage and understand. ✨

How Does it Work in SAP (FI-AR, SD)? 🛠️

SAP uses something called Archiving Object FI_ACCRECV to handle this. Think of it as the tool specifically designed for archiving customer master data in Finance and Sales.

Here's the simplified process:

1. Deletion Flag: First, you need to mark the customer records you want to archive with a "deletion flag". This is like saying, "Hey SAP, these customers are inactive and ready to be archived." You can do this for the whole customer or just specific parts (like Finance or Sales data).
2. Checks & Prerequisites: SAP then does a health check! It makes sure certain conditions are met before archiving, like ensuring there are no open transactions for that customer.
3. Archiving Process (using FI_ACCRECV):
Write Program: This program selects the customer data marked for deletion and writes it into archive files (those "archive boxes").
Delete Program: After the data is safely in the archive files, this program removes it from your live SAP database.
4. Access Archived Data: You can still access archived data later if needed using special tools, it's just not clogging up your daily system.

Where to Find the Archiving Function in SAP? 📍

Transaction SARA: The central place for all archiving activities in SAP. Just enter `FI_ACCRECV` as the archiving object.
Application Menus:
FI: Go to `Customers → Periodical Tasks → Archiving → Customers`.
SD: Navigate through `Logistics → Sales and Distribution → Master Data` (or `Master Data` in SAP Retail) and find `Business Partners → Customers Archiving`.

https://www.linkedin.com/posts/mickaelquesnot_sara-activity-7302366311525826560-Vw9t/

https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:activity:7302593606379290625/

entry.title: 🤯 SAP Archiving Order Matters! 🤯 Customer/Vendor FIRST, then Business Partner!
entry.content:
The Problem: You're in transaction `SARA`, trying to archive Business Partners (using archiving object `CA_BUPA`), and SAP stops you with that error message. It's like SAP saying, "Hold your horses! You're trying to archive the foundation before removing the building on top!" 🧱➡️🏠

Why This Happens: SAP's Data Hierarchy Explained Simply 🤔

In SAP S/4HANA, the Business Partner (BP) is the leading object. Think of it as the central hub for all your customer and vendor information. Customers and Vendors are then linked to this Business Partner.

Business Partner (BP): The main contact person or organization.
Customer: The BP from a sales perspective.
Vendor: The BP from a purchasing perspective.

Because the BP is the central piece, SAP needs you to archive the linked Customer and Vendor data first. It's like peeling an onion – you have to remove the outer layers (Customer/Vendor) before you can get to the core (Business Partner). 🧅

The Solution: Archiving in the Right Order! ✅

To successfully archive Business Partners, you need to follow this order:

1. Archive Customer Master Data (if applicable): Use transaction `SARA` and archiving object `FI_ACCRECV`. This is like archiving your customer-specific "outer layer". (Check out my previous LinkedIn post on Customer Master Data Archiving for a "dummies" explanation! [Link to your Customer Archiving Post if you made one])
2. Archive Vendor Master Data (if applicable): Use transaction `SARA` and archiving object `FI_ACCPAYB`. This is like archiving your vendor-specific "outer layer". (Again, see my previous post on Vendor Master Data Archiving for a simple guide! [Link to your Vendor Archiving Post if you made one])
3. NOW Archive Business Partners: Once the linked Customer and Vendor data is archived, you can finally archive your Business Partners using transaction `SARA` and archiving object `CA_BUPA`. This is like finally getting to archive the "core" BP data.

Why is this important? SAP does this to maintain data consistency and avoid data loss. If you deleted the Business Partner first, you could create orphaned Customer/Vendor records, which would cause all sorts of problems! 😬

Key Takeaway for SAP Beginners: 💡

Remember the order! Customer/Vendor data MUST be archived before Business Partner data. Think of it as SAP's way of keeping your data house in order! Follow this sequence, and you'll avoid those frustrating archiving errors and keep your S/4HANA system nice and tidy! ✨

https://www.linkedin.com/posts/mickaelquesnot_gusap-s4-hanaarchiving-business-partnersdocx-activity-7302386221962432514-jTO_/

entry.title: Re: Aggregation on Data Action
entry.content: Check your data if value of unit account match value of price account for all dimensions, then you can execute and check result .

entry.title: Re: Setup SAML in SAP HANA with external Identity Provider
entry.content:
Nice blog!

I have a question, what should be done for SSO in case of HANA SR? If a takeover from primary to secondary happens, how to make SSO continue working? 

Thanks!

entry.title: Change the default document type of Credit memo in Create Supplier invoice APP
entry.content:
When we posting the supplier invoice and credit memo in Create Supplier invoice APP, the default document type are the "RE", is it possible to choose the credit memo the system can automatic default the document type to "KG"? Can you please help suggest how to realise it? Thank you.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Change the default document type of Credit memo in Cr...
entry.content:
Currently there is no configuration to specify the default document type for credit memo. As workaround you may consider using BADI MRM_HEADER_DATA_DEFAULT to set the default document type as KG.

Please check this online documentation about all available BADIs for supplier invoice:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0e602d466b99490187fcbb30d1dc897c/5a27c5f57c3f4dffa6881ca587b22571.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: Aggregation on Data Action
entry.content: William_Yu  How can the values of the Unit account and Price account be the same, given that the price is calculated using the formula: DRV0055 Lookup Price (NA) = LOOKUP([DRV0050], [d/ENTITY] = "#") Since the Lookup Price for the United States is marked as unbooked data, I copied the value from Entity #, which is 2280, but when calculating manually (using excel sheet), the accumulated value against the dimension appears as 2215. This discrepancy seems to be due to footwear data not appearing for December 2019. However, when using a numeric point chart, the value is displayed accurately.. This discrepancy suggests that the lookup might not be retrieving values correctly across all dimensions, or some form of aggregation is affecting the final result. Could it be that certain records are missing or being aggregated differently? scripting: interms of scripting have used the following formula //DATA([d/ACCOUNT] = "DRV0055",[d/ENTITY] = "REG0001") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/ACCOUNT] = "DRV0050", [d/ENTITY] = "#")

entry.title: Beyond SAP Cloud - Episode 7: BTP Landscape structure
entry.content:
This episode focuses on structuring your Business Technology Platform (BTP) landscape, offering best practices for large companies. It explains how to use directories and sub-accounts for organizing different modules and services like HANA Cloud, integration suite, Work Zone and applications. We highlight the importance of a global account to share credits across departments and recommends a scalable, organized approach that allows for growth and flexibility, while maintaining a clear structure for administrators, applications, and databases. The episode emphasizes that there is no one-size-fits-all solution, but a structured model that can grow with your needs.

 

Takeaways

  • BTP provides flexibility in structuring your landscape using directories for various departments and/or services.
  • You can create directories up to five levels deep, allowing for detailed organization in large companies.
  • Sharing credits across sub-accounts is essential to avoid wastage at the end of the year, especially with consumption-based licenses.
  • A single Global account with multiple sub-accounts helps streamline credit usage and administration across different departments.
  • The recommended minimum setup involves separate directories for administrators and applications.
  • Integration services (e.g., Integration Suite) should be placed in a separate directory to manage connections and destinations securely.
  • HANA Cloud, being expensive, should be separated into its own sub-account to optimize cost management and scalability.
  • For future growth, you can create directories for additional extensions on top of SuccessFactors or C4C to facilitate easy integration and scaling.
  • Keeping related applications within the same subaccount simplifies integration and improves management of your BTP landscape.

entry.title: Re: Access detail story from main story
entry.content:
@deshmukh 

I think technically this would not be possible. Even if you keep the child stories in a different folder, Once the user knows the folder, they can always navigate to it through file system browse. 

 

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: How to Print Comments in the TAB Console in Eclipse for Custom Logic in SAP Public Cloud?
entry.content: The console is usually written to by implementing the interface IF_OO_ADT_CLASSRUN.

entry.title: Planned Goods issue date in outbound delivery and Goods issue Date in Sales Order is different
entry.content:
Hello, 

Users reported 1 issue and I have recreated a test data in testing environment.

In SO1, sales order was created on Feb 18, 2025 at 13:17:37. Timezone is JST.

Pick/pack hours are set as 5 hrs.

Warehouse business hours are set between 8:00~18:00.

Transportatio plan. day is not defined.

Lodaing time is not defined.

Transit Time is defined as 1 business day.

 

In SO1, Material available date is Feb 18, 2025 and Goods Issue Date(Delivery Date) was proposed as Feb 19, 2025 because SAP has considered pick/pack hours and warehouse business hours.

Pick/pack hours will exceed warehouse business hours, so SAP has proposed Goods issue date(Delivery Date) as next business day.

This is understandable.

Then users have deleted Route in order to enforce delivery date as Feb 18, 2025, and sales order has been saved.

Another SO2 has been created almost the same time at Feb 18, 2025 at  13:38:00, which is almost the same timing as SO1.

Delivery schedule proposed was same as SO1 above. 

Material available date proposed was Feb 18 2025.

Goods issue date proposed was Feb 19, 2025.

Users have deleted route so that pick/pack hours are ignored.

Deleting Route enforced delivery date to be set as Feb 18, 2025.

For both SOs, outbound delivery have been created via t-cd VL10E.

Delv1  and Delv2.

In Delv1, Planned GI date was set as Feb 18, 2025, which is same as Goods issue date in Sales Order.

However, in Delv2, Planned GI date was set as Feb 19, 2025, which is different from Goods issue date in Sales Order.

In standard SAP, Goods issue date in Sales Order should have been proposed to Planned GI date in Outbound delivery document.

Since Route has been removed, pick/pack hours should be ignored in the system, so delivery schedule should be met.

(Material available date=Transport Plan. Date=Loading Date=Goods Issue Date(Delivery Date) )

Could help us to understand why Delv2 has Feb 19, 2025 in Planned GI was proposed in outbound delivery instead of Feb 18, 2025?

entry.title: Re: Need help with CL_GUI_DOCKING_CONTAINER, SIZE BAR.
entry.content:
I guess "SIZE BAR" is the dragging bar (or not dragging) which separates the containers, right?

If yes, I don't know a way, I never saw standard SAP screens implementing such a feature. The documentation doesn't say it's possible.

The size of docking containers is always adjustable.

entry.title: Re: Unable to generate proxy classes - Android SDK
entry.content:
The generated file is Kotlin file, you can tried to search it in you space.

Regrading the proxygeneratortool,  It's supposed to be the JDK issue, I suggest using JDK17.

entry.title: Re: Mass SPRO Special Procurement Key config options
entry.content: You may transport the changed contents of any table by entering manually R3TR TABU entries and the keys of the lines to transport. If the line keys don't correspond to existing lines, they will correspond to deletions.

entry.title: Unable to connect EKET, EKES table based on schedule lines ( ETENR)
entry.content:
Hello All,

We need to determine supplier shipping performance based on our ME38 delivery date, qty with respect to EKES table actual data and qty with reference to ETENR of EKET.

Guide us how to link or guide how to get the report of shipping performance  of supplier based on EKET and EKES with respect to ETENR.

 

Gururajan A

entry.title: Re: connection to the database is lost (odbc-1102) message 131-183
entry.content: "Refresh Database User" is the perfect solution—it worked for me!

entry.title: Re: Maintenance plans with status "Scheduled Save to call "
entry.content:
Greetings,

you can try using IP19 transaction. This transaction is used to simulate maintenance plans. Below is an example of the same maintenance plan in IP10 transaction and IP19. You can then filelter results by "call status" column.

And the same maintenance plan in IP19 transaction.

Best regards, M.

Marc

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Revenue Recognition with Result Analysis – Cost based PoC
entry.content:
Hi Manohar,

 

thank you for this very well documented blog, thanks for sharing.

I would have one question though : you refer to three valuations types: Legal Valuation, Group valuation and Profit center valuation. Is it possible to set up an additional one?

It looks like the setting "ledger from which CO reads Actula Data" is limited to three entries  due to the valuation view of version 0 Legal, 1 group, 2 profit center. 

In our case, one country have a specific RA version but I don't know how to handle it.

Thank you in advance,

Thibaud de La Brosse

entry.title: Re: candidate id when hired NO ONB and NO EC
entry.content:
Hi,

Hope you are doing well
Yeah as per your requirement, it will not work from creating a field from RCM, Usually it work as per the sequence process
But to achieve this SAP provides standard solution, in which you can setup a rule in which you can concatenate the two value with the sequence id and put the IF conditional to seperate from ONB and EC

For more information and step to configure please follow the below link

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_ONBOARDING/c94ed5fcb5fe4e0281f396556743812c/976f2ae3b44b4f0da3f06f53b8331e64.html

 

Regards,
Arun Singh

entry.title: Passing Global Filter Parameters to Multiple CDS in Fiori OVP
entry.content:
I am working on a Fiori OVP application where the global filter entity is based on one CDS view, while the charts are derived from different CDS views. I need to ensure that the parameters selected in the global
filter are passed to all the entity sets used in the OVP cards.

Could you please guide me to pass the parametes in manifest.json file?

entry.title: Re: Aggregation on Data Action
entry.content: It's not about matching value it's about matching the data point.

entry.title: Re: Extend suppliers with a different number as BP via DMC
entry.content:
Hi @AMLiberia 

In Migration cockpit, the migration object Supplier is only supporting for "business partners and suppliers that use the same ID".

The same with migration object Customer. You may find this information in the help portal for corresponding migration object.

Note
This migration object only supports business partners and suppliers that use the same ID.

If you want to use different number, please kindly consider to use another approaches in BP side.

Best regards,

Irene

entry.title: Re: Refresh Option in reports
entry.content:
Hi, found the solution for my requirement. 

In order to get the refresh option in this report " Expert mode" should be switched on in Environment> Options:

entry.title: Re: Refresh Option in reports
entry.content: Hi, Thank you for your reply.

entry.title: Re: How the materials are getting displayed in Monitor ma...
entry.content:
MRP segments is one of the criteria which will decide which material will be displayed.

Later the Configuration check this

SIMG - Production - Material Requirements Planning - Apps for Material Requirements Planning - General Settings - Define Supply and Demand Profiles

SIMG - Production - Material Requirements Planning - Apps for Material Requirements Planning - General Settings - Define Material Shortage Profiles.

Hope this helps

entry.title: Re: How can set authorization for restricted report by PR...
entry.content:
Hello @Keratiya_D ,

you can edit the existing roles in PFCG and limit the access by Authorization Object M_BEST_BSA by entering the specific document type for which you want to users to use the report

entry.title: Background job details
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

How to find how many back ground jobs in production server.

Any table or Tcode available for background jobs. We want only basic information of the job like job name, program name, created by, created date.

Table TBTCO, TBTCP containing job count. Without job count any table available for background jobs.

entry.title: SAP SAC Planning OPEX
entry.content:
Hi All.

 

WE have Model in which Companycode,ProfitCenter and Functional are are Properties of Costcenter.

Story1 we have 

Properties in rows  and GL account ,in columns we have Measure version and time.

 

Story2 we have coscenter and GLaccount in rows and Measure,version and time.

Our requirement is Measure should get populated in story 2 based on costcenter(it should bring as per combination to Properties of Costcenter (mean CompanyCode,Profitcenter and FunctionlaArea) and GL Account

 

Can some how help how to achieve it.

1.in story 2 our reqment to use only coscenter.

 

Regards 

vijay

entry.title: Re: SAP ERP Solution unit onboarding guide for e-Invoicing in KSA
entry.content:
Hi All, @brennen_fischer12,

I am encountering an issue while requesting CCSID and would appreciate your guidance on how you resolved it.

  1. Initially, before maintaining the Alias for the Solution Unit ID, I received the following error in the HTTP_Receiver_Adapter_Response_Body:

    xml
    <?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <error xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata"> <code>Not Found</code> <message xml:lang="en">Alias '005056**************eef_1' not found in the keystore</message> </error>

    To resolve this, I added the Alias, and now the IFLOW completes successfully. However, I am still facing the following issue:

  2. The HTTP_Receiver_Adapter_Response_Body now returns:

    json
    {"errorCode":"400","errorCategory":"Invalid-CSR","errorMessage":"The provided Certificate Signing Request (CSR) is invalid."}

  3. Additionally, after entering a valid OTP in SACSIDG, I receive the following response:

    markdown
    CCSID request failed for 00505*********************EEF Message No. EDOCUMENT_SA000

Could you please advise on how to resolve this?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Usage Scenarios of Work Pack Type
entry.content:
Hello,

In SAP S/4HANA Asset Management, the work pack type is used to categorize and organize maintenance order operations into work packs. This allows for efficient planning, execution, and communication of maintenance tasks. Work pack types help in grouping jobs based on specific criteria, such as work center or job level, which facilitates the maintenance supervisor in managing and distributing necessary documents for planned maintenance activities. 

Please refer to this blog for more details.SAP S/4HANA Asset Management – Output Management u... - SAP Community

BR,

Vijayalaxmi Melavanki

entry.title: Re: Integrating with the Alerts System API in SAP Service Cloud V2
entry.content:
@pvsbprasad @Saurabh_Kabra 

External Alerts are not default available in all tenants, It needs to be requested via SAP Support Ticket to enable in your SAP Sales & Service Cloud v2 tenant.

entry.title: Re: Aggregation on Data Action
entry.content: n/a

entry.title: Re: Aggregation on Data Action
entry.content: I would suggest you put two source accounts and target account into column axis, and rest of the dimensions into row axis, you can easily find out if multiply two accounts will have result. Or how should specify different conditions in RESULTLOOKUP like [d/Entity] = "#".

entry.title: Re: Selective data migration approach
entry.content:
Hi @venkat_narasimhan2 
Attaching the content for this KBA, kindly check below:

Symptom

This article provides information and further insight into the topics of “Selective Data Transition” and “Selective Data Transition Engagement”. Selective Data Transition is also marketed with different brand names by the members of SDTE (like “Bluefield”, “s.m.a.r.t”, "colorful", “Allfield”, “Selective S/4HANA Transition” and others).

You are searching for information with regards to answers to frequently asked key questions, statements with regards to key topics regarding functionality, scope and inclusions/exclusions concerning the Selective Data Transition concept and its support.

You want to understand more about if and how these offerings are supported or signed off by SAP.

Environment

Transformation of any SAP ERP solution to SAP S/4HANA using the Selective Data Transition approach.

As a customer you are planning to transform your system landscape based on SAP ERP to SAP S/4HANA.

You are in the process of discussing a roadmap or planning a project to perform a Selective Data Transition (SDT) with SAP, a partner of SAP or a member of the Selective Data Transition Engagement (SDTE).

Resolution

Selective Data Transitionstands for one of the three transition scenario options for our customers moving from SAP ECC to SAP S/4HANA. It allows for a tailored migration scope between System Conversion (“re-use” aka brownfield) and New Implementation (“re-design” aka greenfield). Typical for the approach is the flexibility to adapt data and processes in one migration step. This approach covers any relevant business data including historic transactional data

Partners active as members of the Selective Data Transition Engagement have agreed to work on qualitative standards and common approaches utilizing SAP Activate methodology and deliverables (e.g. quality gates, templates) defined therein. The partners are using their own tools and products among other solution. There is no sign-off or safe-guarding of intermediate or end results and key deliverables by SAP for projects delivered by a third-party member of the SDTE.

SAP is hosting member of this group, but does not rate, highlight or recommend a specific solution, approach, or product to carry out a Selective Data Transition. There is also no certificate issued by SAP for such a solution, approach, tool or product. SAP does not certify products and tools for reasons of product liability or other legal requirements arising from competition law, contractual obligations or other agreements in place.

SAP advises its customers to be conscious about possible implications related to SAP S/4HANA Selective Data Transition. The afore mentioned advantages are achieved by a direct migration of data on database table-level bypassing official standard interfaces for application data migration provided by SAP.

This may lead to inconsistent business data and result in further functional issues or errors such as issues in posting of documents, wrong reporting, period end processes. These may range from errors during execution of single transactions to disruptions in complete business processes based on SAP S/4HANA functionality.

Such inconsistencies or issues, if they arise from the use of tools and products bypassing official SAP standard interfaces, are not covered by the SAP Support Agreements and may prevent SAP Support from being able to identify and assist in the correction of potential problems which, in turn, may possibly result in unsatisfactory software performance for which SAP cannot be held responsible. SAP Support will perform an initial root-cause analysis, even in case of inconsistencies, as part of regular support agreements in place between customer and SAP.

Typically, in this case existing support contracts with the SDTE member apply. If the SDTE member is not able to fix the issue, SAP Support will try to help a customer in need if technically possible. This remediation or correction will be delivered as a chargeable SAP service.

In any case, SAP is kindly asking you to provide the information about the involvement of a third party in the case to be raised. This will help SAP support in processing the case, in a possible resolution of the issue and reduce the processing time.

SAP News Announcement about Selective Data Transition Engagement

SAP Selective Data Transition Landing page

entry.title: Re: Aggregation on Data Action
entry.content: William_Yu please confirm if doing it rightly or not cause I am doing it for North East Entity only to not create a mess so I take only one entity at a time

entry.title: Re: ME_CUST_PO Enhancement : PO Amount Check Against PR
entry.content: Hi everyone , i am trying to create an enhancement using the badi me_process_po_cust , the requirement is pretty simple here , we need to validate the total PR with the total PO amount , if the po amount exceeds the PR amount then we should give error , this i can validate it process_item, but i am confused in case of a scenario where there's one PR and there are multiple POs referencing that PR , and i need to calculate the total PR with respect to multiple POs totalling it and then to compare it that wether it is exceeding the total pr or not if yes then error otherwise allow to save , so this where i should write , because in process_item it validates single line item not overall , and if i write in process_header then there's no signature for im_item , there's only one signature of IM_HEADER and if i export parameters , there's no exporting parameters from process_item method , Please suggest/help
